playbook.intent: End-of-week recap to each active client: shipped / blocked / next, plus hours logged. Done = report sent, invoice draft updated, retainer-cap watch list refreshed.
playbook.scope: End-of-week recap to each active client: shipped / blocked / next, plus hours logged. Done = report sent, invoice draft updated, retainer-cap watch list refreshed.

success-criteria.criterion: Compile stage complete: Raw weekly compile per client
Write report stage complete: Weekly report per client
Send + invoice stage complete: Reports sent log

stage.name: Compile
stage.intent: Pull together shipped, blocked, next, hours.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every active client has data ready.

stage.name: Write report
stage.intent: Crisp shipped/blocked/next note with retainer-cap awareness.

tasks.task: Attach week-on-week metric trend if applicable

stage.decision-gate: Report must include retainer-cap line. No exceptions.

stage.name: Send + invoice
stage.intent: Send Friday before EOD; update invoice draft for month-end.

tasks.task: Update draft invoice with this-week's hours
Update watch list for caps near limit

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes only when invoice drafts are current.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']

{human: faion get-content friday-weekly-client-report --format md, agent: faion get-content friday-weekly-client-report --format context, json: faion get-content friday-weekly-client-report --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, atomic angle'}]
